div.style: margin: 0; padding: 0; font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif; background-color: #f8fafc;
max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; background-color: white; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);

h1.style: color: white; margin: 0; font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold;

div.style: background-color: #f3f4f6; padding: 20px; text-align: center; border-top: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
div.p:
This is an automated message from MESSOB Fleet Management System.
Please do not reply to this email. For support, contact your fleet administrator.
Alert generated on {{ object.alert_date.strftime('%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p') if object.alert_date else 'N/A' }}

record.field: 📊 MESSOB Fleet Daily Maintenance Summary - {{ datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%B %d, %Y') }}

div.style: margin: 0; padding: 0; font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif; background-color: #f8fafc;
max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto; background-color: white; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);

h1.style: color: white; margin: 0; font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold;

div.style: display: flex; justify-content: space-around; text-align: center;
font-size: 12px; color: #6b7280; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: bold;
font-size: 12px; color: #6b7280; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: bold;
font-size: 12px; color: #6b7280; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: bold;
font-size: 12px; color: #6b7280; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: bold;
background-color: #f3f4f6; padding: 20px; text-align: center; border-top: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
div.p:
This is an automated daily summary from MESSOB Fleet Management System.
For immediate assistance, contact the fleet operations team.
